info.name: Space Weather Dashboard
info.summary: Real-time space weather monitoring with NOAA, NASA, and HamQSL data
info.description:
Stay ahead of space weather. The Space Weather Dashboard brings real-time NOAA, NASA, and HamQSL data directly into your Nextcloud — no external websites, no extra logins, no clutter.
Track geomagnetic storms with the KP Index, monitor solar flare activity via X-ray flux levels, and check F10.7 solar flux measurements at a glance. See live aurora forecast maps, HF band propagation conditions for radio operators, and D-RAP absorption maps — all updated every few minutes.
Browse solar imagery across six SDO wavelengths (193Å through magnetogram), view full-disk weather satellite images from GOES-16 and GOES-18, and keep tabs on sunspot counts and K-index readings.
Built for ham radio operators, aurora chasers, and anyone who wants the Sun's activity on their dashboard. No JavaScript build step, no frameworks, and full support for Nextcloud dark and light themes.
info.author: Kevin Watkins
Kevin Watkins
